/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.7", "profile_name": "restaurant_analytis", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.restaurant_analytis.dim_user"} */

  create or replace view
    "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_user"
  security definer
  as
    WITH user_raw AS (
    SELECT 
        us.user_id as user_id,
        us.name as user_name,
        us.average_stars as average_stars,
        us.review_count as review_count,
        us.funny as funny,
        us.cool as cool,
        us.fans as fans,
        us.friends as friends,
        us.compliment_cool as compliment_cool,
        us.compliment_cute as compliment_cute,
        us.compliment_funny as compliment_funny,
        us.compliment_hot as compliment_hot,
        us.compliment_list as compliment_list,
        us.compliment_more as compliment_more,
        us.compliment_note as compliment_note,
        us.compliment_photos as compliment_photos,
        us.compliment_plain as compliment_plain, 
        us.compliment_profile as compliment_profile,
        us.compliment_writer as compliment_writer
    FROM "lakehouse"."bronze"."user" us
)

SELECT * FROM user_raw

/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.7", "profile_name": "restaurant_analytis", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.restaurant_analytis.dim_restaurant"} */

  create or replace view
    "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_restaurant"
  security definer
  as
    WITH restaurant_raw AS (
    SELECT
        sr.business_id as restaurant_id,
        sr.name as restaurant_name,
        sr.categories as categories,
        sr.city as city,
        sr.address as address,
        sr.is_open as is_open,
        sr.latitude as latitude,
        sr.longitude as longitude,
        sr.postal_code as postal_code,
        sr.review_count as review_count,
        sr.stars as stars,
        sr.state as state,
        sr.hours as hours
    FROM "lakehouse"."bronze"."restaurant" sr
)
SELECT * FROM restaurant_raw

/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.7", "profile_name": "restaurant_analytis", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.restaurant_analytis.fact_review"} */

  create or replace view
    "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."fact_review"
  security definer
  as
    WITH review_raw AS (
    SELECT
        rr.review_id as review_id,
        rr.business_id as restaurant_id,
        rr.user_id as user_id,
        rr.stars as stars,
        rr.cool as cool,
        rr.funny as funny,
        rr.useful as useful,
        CAST(rr.date AS VARCHAR) as review_date,
        rr.text as review_description
    FROM "lakehouse"."bronze"."review" rr
)
SELECT * FROM review_raw

results.compiled_code:
WITH review_raw AS (
    SELECT
        rr.review_id as review_id,
        rr.business_id as restaurant_id,
        rr.user_id as user_id,
        rr.stars as stars,
        rr.cool as cool,
        rr.funny as funny,
        rr.useful as useful,
        CAST(rr.date AS VARCHAR) as review_date,
        rr.text as review_description
    FROM "lakehouse"."bronze"."review" rr
)

/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.7", "profile_name": "restaurant_analytis", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.restaurant_analytis.analyses_review"} */

  create or replace view
    "lakehouse"."dev_gold"."analyses_review"
  security definer
  as
    WITH analyses AS (
    SELECT 
        fr.*,
        dr.restaurant_name as restaurant_name,
        dr.categories as categories,
        dr.city as city,
        dr.latitude as latitude,
        dr.longitude as longitude,
        dr.stars as restaurant_stars,
        dr.state as state,
        dr.review_count as review_count,
        dr.hours as hours,
        du.user_name
    FROM "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."fact_review" fr
    LEFT JOIN "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_restaurant" dr
    ON fr.restaurant_id = dr.restaurant_id
    LEFT JOIN "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_user" du 
    ON fr.user_id = du.user_id
)
SELECT * FROM analyses

results.compiled_code:
WITH analyses AS (
    SELECT 
        fr.*,
        dr.restaurant_name as restaurant_name,
        dr.categories as categories,
        dr.city as city,
        dr.latitude as latitude,
        dr.longitude as longitude,
        dr.stars as restaurant_stars,
        dr.state as state,
        dr.review_count as review_count,
        dr.hours as hours,
        du.user_name
    FROM "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."fact_review" fr
    LEFT JOIN "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_restaurant" dr
    ON fr.restaurant_id = dr.restaurant_id
    LEFT JOIN "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_user" du 
    ON fr.user_id = du.user_id
)
SELECT * FROM analyses

adapter_response.query:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.7", "profile_name": "restaurant_analytis", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.restaurant_analytis.dim_date"} */

  
    

    create table "lakehouse"."dev_silver"."dim_date"
      
      
    as (
      

select
  year(calendarDate) * 10000 + month(calendarDate) * 100 + day(calendarDate) as dateInt,
  CalendarDate,
  year(calendarDate) AS CalendarYear,
  format_datetime(calendarDate, 'MMMM') as CalendarMonth,
  month(calendarDate) as MonthOfYear,
  format_datetime(calendarDate, 'EEEE') as CalendarDay,
  day_of_week(calendarDate) AS DayOfWeek,
  day_of_week(calendarDate) as DayOfWeekStartMonday,
  case
    when day_of_week(calendarDate) < 6 then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsWeekDay,
  day_of_month(calendarDate) as DayOfMonth,
  case
    when calendarDate = last_day_of_month(calendarDate) then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsLastDayOfMonth,
  day_of_year(calendarDate) as DayOfYear,
  week_of_year(calendarDate) as WeekOfYearIso,
  quarter(calendarDate) as QuarterOfYear,
  /* Use fiscal periods needed by organization fiscal calendar */
  case
    when month(calendarDate) >= 10 then year(calendarDate) + 1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FiscalYearOctToSep,
  (month(calendarDate) + 2) % 12 + 1 AS FiscalMonthOctToSep,
  case
    when month(calendarDate) >= 7 then year(calendarDate) + 1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FiscalYearJulToJun,
  (month(calendarDate) + 5) % 12 + 1 AS FiscalMonthJulToJun
from
    UNNEST(sequence(DATE '2010-01-01', DATE '2037-01-01', INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS t(calendarDate)
order by
  calendarDate
    )

results.compiled_code:
select
  year(calendarDate) * 10000 + month(calendarDate) * 100 + day(calendarDate) as dateInt,
  CalendarDate,
  year(calendarDate) AS CalendarYear,
  format_datetime(calendarDate, 'MMMM') as CalendarMonth,
  month(calendarDate) as MonthOfYear,
  format_datetime(calendarDate, 'EEEE') as CalendarDay,
  day_of_week(calendarDate) AS DayOfWeek,
  day_of_week(calendarDate) as DayOfWeekStartMonday,
  case
    when day_of_week(calendarDate) < 6 then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsWeekDay,
  day_of_month(calendarDate) as DayOfMonth,
  case
    when calendarDate = last_day_of_month(calendarDate) then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsLastDayOfMonth,
  day_of_year(calendarDate) as DayOfYear,
  week_of_year(calendarDate) as WeekOfYearIso,
  quarter(calendarDate) as QuarterOfYear,
  /* Use fiscal periods needed by organization fiscal calendar */
  case
    when month(calendarDate) >= 10 then year(calendarDate) + 1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FiscalYearOctToSep,
  (month(calendarDate) + 2) % 12 + 1 AS FiscalMonthOctToSep,
  case
    when month(calendarDate) >= 7 then year(calendarDate) + 1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FiscalYearJulToJun,
  (month(calendarDate) + 5) % 12 + 1 AS FiscalMonthJulToJun
from
    UNNEST(sequence(DATE '2010-01-01', DATE '2037-01-01', INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS t(calendarDate)
order by
  calendarDate
